# _ssg/ — Databricks deploy build artifact (DO NOT EDIT)

This directory is regenerated on every `bash databricks-deploy/deploy.sh`
run via Pass 0 (cp -R kb/output/ ./_ssg/) followed by Pass 0b (lang flip),
Pass 0c (stage synthesize deps), and Pass 0d (rebrand for Databricks audience).

Edits here are LOST on next deploy. To make permanent changes:
- HTML / wiki / articles content: edit kb/output/ source via SSG bake
  (kb/export_knowledge_base.py)
- Static assets (CSS / JS / favicon): edit kb/static/ which Pass 0 copies
- Templates: edit kb/templates/ which kb/export_knowledge_base.py renders

Hot-patch path (temporary diagnostic):
- You MAY edit _ssg/* files directly to test a fix
- BUT they will be overwritten on next bash deploy.sh run
- Permanent fix path: edit upstream (kb/static, kb/templates, kb/output)
- See CLAUDE.md PRINCIPLE #9 for full pipeline requirements

This directory is git-ignored. Do not git add files here.
